title: Thodu Vaanam Lyrics Anegan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Anegan Thodu Vaanam Song Lyrics
Singer(s):Hariharan, Shakthisree Gopalan
Lyrics:Vairamuthu

Thodu vanam, thodukindra neram
thozhivinil podhum,
anal tholidhumey pogum.

Thodu vanam, thodukindra neram
thozhivinil podhum,
anal tholidhumey pogum.

Idhayathilae thee pidiththu
kanavellaam karugiyadhey
uyire nee urugum munnae
kannae kanbaeno.

Ilai melae panithuli pola
ingum angumaai ulavugindrom.
kattradithaal sidharukindrom
ponnae poondhaeney.

Vali endraal kadhalin valithaan
valigalill peridhu,
adhu vazhvinum kodidhu.
Unai neengiye uyir karaigiraen.
vaan neelathil ennai pudhaikiraen [2]

Idhayathilae thee pidiththu
kanavellaam karugiyadhey
uyire nee urugum munnae
kannae kanbaeno.

Ilai melae panithuli pola
ingum angumaai ulavugindrom.
kattradithaal sidharukindrom
ponnae poondhaeney.

Kadhal ennai piligiradhey
kanneer madhiyaai vazhigiradhey
ninaipathu thollai
marapadhu thollai
vazhve valikkiradhey.

Kattil thozhindha mazhaithuli pol
kannaae neeyum thozhaindhadhenna
neerinai thaedum verr-inai pola
pennae unnai kanndeduppaen.

Kangal rendum moodum podhum
nooru vannam thondrudhaey.
meendum kangal paarkkum
podhu logam soniyam aagudhey.

Siru pozhudhu pirindhadharkkae
pala pozhudhu kadhari vittaai
janmangalaai pen thuyaram
arrivaayo nee

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thodu Vaanam?

The song Thodu Vaanam expresses themes of love and connection, highlighting the beauty of togetherness.

What is the context of this song in the movie Anegan?

In Anegan, this song plays during a romantic sequence, showcasing the deep emotional bond between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Thodu Vaanam?

The song is sung by renowned artists Hariharan and Shakthisree Gopalan.

Who composed the music for Thodu Vaanam?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was Thodu Vaanam released?

The song was released on November 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thodu Vaanam, the characters in Anegan experience a profound connection that transcends time and space. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of longing and romance, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. With its rich emotional depth, the track beautifully conveys the essence of love, leaving listeners enchanted. This duet showcases the exceptional vocal talents of Hariharan and Shakthisree Gopalan, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thodu Vaanam from Anegan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Shakthisree Gopalan, this track is a perfect blend of emotion and melody. Experience the enchanting lyrics by Vairamuthu that elevate this song to a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: When the sky is touched, it's enough to live, but it will eventually fade away.
As the sky touches, you become close, but in that moment, you seem to disappear.
When the sky is touched, it's enough to live, but it will eventually fade away.
In the heart, holding fire, all dreams are melting, will you come before me, my dear?
Like dew on leaves, we are here and there. We are getting stronger through the storms, my dear.
If love is a path, it is wide and vast, it gives life. I am calling out to you. I am becoming new in the blue sky.
In the heart, holding fire, all dreams are melting, will you come before me, my dear?
Like dew on leaves, we are here and there. We are getting stronger through the storms, my dear.
Love is like a tear, it flows and lives, forgetting is a burden, living is a struggle.
Like rain falling on a bed, you too have fallen, searching for the water, I will find you like a river.
Both eyes close, and a hundred colors appear. When we open our eyes again, the world becomes beautiful.
In a short time, separation brings many moments of pain, you have become a burden in this life.
